title: YTPMV: Some People...
description:
Well, this will more than likely be my last video of the year. Since, from here on, I'll be busy with many things. So, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year.. and all that junk...

Also, I've very aware Team Fortress 2 YTPMVs are overused, but so is your mom... so, shut up.

ALSO! For those people who wanted me to finish my All Your Base YTPMV, I probably will.
